title: Eva 00 Cameo in Evangelion 30
wikitext:
[]: Eva-00 Cameo in Evangelion 3.0? Post by Damaijin » Wed Oct 30, 2013 12:08 am Roughly 11:45 into the film, we see a lower level of AAA Wunder wherein there appears to be an Eva submerged in a pool of LCL. The color of its armor/restraints is yellow and it appears to have twin shoulder apparatuses like the standard Eva. Furthermore, it seems to be sporting Unit-00's trademark one-eyed helmet. Is that an Eva, or am I not understanding what I'm seeing? If it is an Eva: 1. What's it doing there? What's its purpose? 2. What's the state of its body? Is the lower half of it submerged or is it just a torso? There does seem to be some kind of bone structure protruding from its upper half, vaguely resembling a warped ribcage or pelvis, but it could just be some machinery as well. 3. Is it 00? I know Zeruel consumed it in 2.0, but the resemblance is uncanny. Thoughts?

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Oct 30, 2013 1:15 am I have no idea about the timestamp since you're using the one with no god warrior short but... ...is this the shot you're talking about?  SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 30, 2013 4:41 am Thank you TM, I always wondered what was these strange rib-like structures hanging above EVA-08. So it's part of its armor... since the outer side of the plates have holes and aren't painted, I suppose it's actually a sub-armor for the big ping main plate. Did the storyboard says anything about the two big black "straps" around its torso, just bellow the plate with the yellow parts. Have we any idea of what it is? On a side note, we can see a yellow pneumatic boat on the back of the hangar, so the old method of diving to repair an immersed Eva is still in use. Scuba diving while the Wunder is airborne must be a very sportive experience!

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Oct 30, 2013 8:22 am We don't have the storyboards yet, not until CRC

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 30, 2013 10:05 am ^ Oh, yes, I expressed myself poorly, sorry. It's just that since there is additional infos in the making-of bonus in the Japanese Blu-Ray(like that the Moon spinning around the ruins of Tokyo-3 is our Moon), as well as in the script hanging around somewhere which clarified the whole business with core erosion and that the big structure emerging from teh ground in 4I was the Black Moon, I thought that maybe one of these sources of informations had something about those straps.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Oct 30, 2013 10:32 am The description in the script is ハンガー内全景吊りげられている装甲パーツ作業中な感じ If that's of any help

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 30, 2013 10:40 am ^ Can someone moon-translate it? Please?

[]: Post by FluffyBunny » Wed Oct 30, 2013 1:21 pm ハンガー内全景 吊りさげられている装甲パーツ 作業中な感じ PAN(わずかに) According to web translation engines something like this? I would guess there's no additional information than we already see. The inside view of the hangar Armor parts being hoisted down Feel of work being performed PAN(a little)

[]: Post by Damaijin » Wed Oct 30, 2013 2:50 pm (*feels like a dork) Er, wow. It's way more pink in your pics than on my TV. I'll need to adjust that immediately... Thanks! !!And thanks twice for all the nerd-porn!!

[]: Post by weeminator24 » Wed Oct 30, 2013 10:48 pm I doubt Eva-00 is even still around, considering that Zeruel ate it... Not unless WILLE dug around in Zeruel's corpse and pulled out the wreckage to be used elsewhere in the wunder...

[]: Post by Craftee » Wed Nov 06, 2013 9:43 pm weeminator24 wrote: I doubt Eva-00 is even still around, considering that Zeruel ate it... Not unless WILLE dug around in Zeruel's corpse and pulled out the wreckage to be used elsewhere in the wunder...

[]: Post by Rei IV » Wed Nov 06, 2013 10:40 pm Or maybe Neo-Nerv took whatever what was left of Unit-00 to add on to make Mark.09?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 06, 2013 11:14 pm Rei IV wrote: Or maybe Neo-Nerv took whatever what was left of Unit-00 to add on to make Mark.09?
